# Skills Catalog — talos-homelab

Curated list of agent skills from [skills.sh](https://skills.sh) relevant to this repo's tech stack.
**Filter:** ≥100 installs only. Generated by `/scan-skills`.

## Verified Verdicts (epic TALOS-d4m)

9 skills were smoke-tested 2026-05-21 against real targets in this repo. Verdict summary:

| Skill | Verdict | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `github/awesome-copilot@multi-stage-dockerfile` | ✅ **KEEP** | 46 lines, principle-driven, modern. Caught real issue (root user) in carrierarr. |
| `jeffallan/claude-skills@kubernetes-specialist` | 🟡 **SCOPE-DOWN** | Textbook checklist. Invoke explicitly on net-new manifests. |
| `wshobson/agents@gitops-workflow` | 🟡 **SCOPE-DOWN** | Doesn't grok dual-controller. Replace with official `fluxcd/agent-skills@*`. |
| `wshobson/agents@grafana-dashboards` | 🟡 **SCOPE-DOWN** | RED/USE methodology good; emits raw JSON not grafana-operator CRDs. |
| `wshobson/agents@helm-chart-scaffolding` | 🟡 **SCOPE-DOWN** | Accurate but we don't author charts in this repo. |
| `wshobson/agents@prometheus-configuration` | ❌ **UNINSTALLED** | 2020-vintage, emits prometheus.yml not PrometheusRule CRDs. Active harm risk. |
| `wshobson/agents@service-mesh-observability` | ❌ **UNINSTALLED** | 95% Istio. We're Cilium/Hubble. Would emit `istio_*` PromQL we can't query. |
| `sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills@docker-expert` | ❌ **UNINSTALLED** | 418 lines bloat; multi-stage-dockerfile covers same ground in 46. |
| `affaan-m/everything-claude-code@docker-patterns` | ❌ **UNINSTALLED** | Docker Compose focused. We're K8s-only. |

**Untested (no `.tf` files in repo):** 5 terraform skills remain installed but unverified.

**Key learning:** install count is a poor proxy for quality. `docker-expert` at **16.1K installs** (highest of the lot) was the worst Docker skill. `multi-stage-dockerfile` at 14K was the only KEEP.

## How to install

```bash
# Project-local (adds to .claude/skills/)
npx skills add <owner/repo@skill>

# Global (user-level, no prompts)
npx skills add <owner/repo@skill> -g -y
```

Browse the full catalog at <https://skills.sh>.

---

## Top Picks (start here)

If you only install 5, these match the stack most directly:

- `grafana/skills@dashboarding` — official Grafana, dashboards-as-code
- `grafana/skills@promql` — official Grafana, PromQL authoring
- `grafana/skills@loki` — official Grafana, LogQL + Loki ops
- `fluxcd/agent-skills@gitops-repo-audit` — official Flux, audits multi-Kustomization repos like this one
- `martinholovsky/claude-skills-generator@talos-os-expert` — only Talos-specific skill on the catalog

## Gaps — no skills found (≥100 installs)

These technologies are part of the stack but have **no matching skills** in the catalog at the threshold:

- **Traefik** (top match: 73 installs — below threshold)
- **cert-manager** (top: 36)
- **Authentik** (top: 32)
- **External Secrets Operator** — none
- **External DNS** — none
- **KubeVirt** — none
- **Nebula (mesh VPN)** — none (closest: WireGuard/Tailscale)
- **Kustomize** (top: 67 — below threshold)
- **Lefthook** — none

If you want skills for these, you could create your own with `npx skills init <name>` and publish back.

---

## Suggested install batches

**Minimal LGTM observability boost:**
```bash
npx skills add grafana/skills@dashboarding -g -y
npx skills add grafana/skills@promql -g -y
npx skills add grafana/skills@loki -g -y
npx skills add grafana/skills@opentelemetry -g -y
npx skills add grafana/skills@loki-label-analyzer -g -y
```

**GitOps deep-dive (Flux-managed repo):**
```bash
npx skills add fluxcd/agent-skills@gitops-knowledge -g -y
npx skills add fluxcd/agent-skills@gitops-cluster-debug -g -y
npx skills add fluxcd/agent-skills@gitops-repo-audit -g -y
npx skills add personamanagmentlayer/pcl@argocd-expert -g -y
```

**Talos + Cilium pair:**
```bash
npx skills add martinholovsky/claude-skills-generator@talos-os-expert -g -y
npx skills add martinholovsky/claude-skills-generator@cilium-expert -g -y
```

**IaC (Terraform/Ansible/Helm):**
```bash
npx skills add hashicorp/agent-skills@terraform-test -g -y
npx skills add hashicorp/agent-skills@terraform-stacks -g -y
npx skills add aj-geddes/useful-ai-prompts@ansible-automation -g -y
npx skills add wshobson/agents@helm-chart-scaffolding -g -y
npx skills add akin-ozer/cc-devops-skills@helm-validator -g -y
```
